_comment: Independent expected SHA-256 digests for louke runtime contract_digest() over three artifact bundles. Computed with Python stdlib (hashlib + json, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) - NOT imported from louke. The product (louke.runtime.contract_gates.contract_digest) must produce identical values; if they ever diverge, drift is detected by tests/ground_truth/test_digest_independence.py. See issue #178 (S5).
algorithm: sha256 over json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) of the artifact map sorted by role; prefixed 'sha256:'
